name: Barnyard & Bone
tagline: Honest, unrestored vintage — new Drop every Thursday at noon Central.
site_goal: Connect estate-sale pickers and barn-find dealers with collectors hunting honest, unrestored vintage furniture, with radical price transparency and freight logistics baked in.
audience: collectors of unrestored and patinated furniture
renters and first-apartment shoppers hunting cheap character pieces
motif: Paper price-tags, stenciled lot numbers, masonry walls of finds, weekly Drop countdowns over mustard-and-brick.

typography.display_grotesque: Helvetica Neue Black / Impact stack — chunky display grotesque (Druk-like)
typography.body_serif: Iowan Old Style / Palatino — old-style serif (Caslon-like) for body and italic interjections
typography.treatment: Display grotesque slammed against italic old-style serif; stenciled lot numbers; paper price-tag labels.

pages.layout: Mustard Drop banner with live countdown over a chaotic masonry wall of fresh finds, with category color blocks, featured pickers, log teaser, and three-step explainer.
Sticky facet pill bar with multi-select and Save-this-search, density slider toggling 3/5/8 column masonry, inline Drop markers, side rail of related searches and sold comps.

Gallery-left, details-right with stacked Patina Report card (wear/repairs/structural/odor + notes), dimensions spec table, freight quote module with SVG route map, seller card, sold comps strip, and more-from-this-Drop carousel.

Big picker portrait header with stats and quote, tabbed shop (Current Drop / Sold / Watched / On-the-truck / Dispatches / Reviews), inventory masonry, dispatch grid, ratings with condition-accuracy score.

Cart grouped by picker with per-group fulfillment toggle (Ship freight / Local pickup / White-glove), consolidation prompt across pickers in shared region, sticky order summary rail, promo/gift fields, watchlist row, and trust strip.

Brick member hero, tabs, May Drop calendar with reminder Drops, three-column watchlist board (Drops soon / Price reduced / About to expire), orders timeline with progress bars and ETAs, followed pickers grid, addresses/payment/notifications preference panels.

'The Picker's Log' photo-essay feed — featured dispatch with oversized italic headline, full-bleed photo and shoppable hotspots; region chip filter; dispatch grid with bylines, locations, and items-recovered counts; submit-a-tip form.

interactions_implemented: Drop countdown timer ticking to next Thursday noon (vanilla JS, every second)
Column-density slider on browse switching masonry between 3 / 5 / 8 columns
Top-bar facet pills toggle on click; Save-this-search button confirms
Watchlist heart icon on every card toggles filled state
Patina Report expandable card with checklist of wear / repairs / structural / odor + Picker's note
Freight quote module: ZIP/postcode input deterministically draws an SVG route, miles, days, and dollar estimate
Sticky cart drawer (collapsed by default, click to expand) with per-page item summaries
Per-picker Ship/Pickup/White-glove toggle on the cart page
Shoppable photo hotspots on the journal featured dispatch
Region chip multi-select on the journal

content_model.Listing: lot number, title, ask price, freight estimate, condition grade chip (Honest wear / Rough but right / Original finish), Patina Report (wear, repairs, structural, odor + picker note), dimensions, dated photos, seller, pickup region
content_model.Drop: scheduled release Thursday noon Central, participating sellers count, item count, preview thumbnails, live countdown
content_model.Seller: handle, region, picker bio, vehicle (delivery range), Drop participation, archive, stats, condition accuracy
content_model.PickerLog: dispatch headline, dateline, location, byline, photo essay with hotspots linking to live listings, items-recovered count
content_model.Order: freight routing map, ETA, multi-stage progress bar, inspection window

mobile_behavior: Drop countdown stays pinned at top; facet pills become horizontal scroller; density slider hides in favor of a fixed two-column masonry; cart drawer collapses to a small sticky bar at the bottom edge.
